title: Know the Risk Before You Route
text:
Know the Risk Before You Route
    A risk quantification API for fleet truck routes — real-time scores, contributing factors, and confidence intervals in a single call.
    
      Request Early Access
      Read the Docs →
    
  
  
    
      
        
        |:| llano
      
      
        $ llano compare \
        "4710 N PanAm Expy, San Antonio" \
        "250 University, Round Rock" \
        --waypoints "TX-130" "I-35" "US-183"
         
        Scoring 3 routes...
         
        
            A
          via TX-130/45       
          69/100 ● GOOD  
          ✓ Go
        
        
            B
          via I-35 thru Austin
          42/100 ● FAIR  
          ⚠ Monitor
        
        
            C
          via US-183 East    
          21/100 ● POOR 
          ✕ Delay
        
         
          Recommendation: Route A
          Batch response: 287ms
         
        
      
    
  




  2.4M+Routes Scored
  
  254TX Counties
  
  94%Prediction Accuracy
  
  <200msAvg Response Time




  HOW IT WORKS
  From Route to Risk in Milliseconds
  
    
      01
      Submit a Route
      Send origin, destination, vehicle class, and departure time to the API.
    
    →
    
      02
      Score Computed
      Our model ingests real-time weather, traffic, road quality, and historical incident data.
    
    →
    
      03
      Safety Score Returned
      Receive a 0–100 safety score, grade, confidence interval, contributing factors, and hotspot locations.
    
  




  ROUTE COMPARISON
  Score Before You Dispatch
  Evaluate multiple options in parallel. Route smarter, not harder.
  

    
      
        Route A
        GOOD
      
      San Antonio → TX-130/45 via Lockhart → Round Rock
      
        69
        
          
        
      
      
        Light toll road traffic0.19
        Clear weather0.15
        Well-maintained surface0.10
      
      ✓  Recommended · Fewest Delays
    

    
      
        Route B
        FAIR
      
      San Antonio → I-35 through Austin → Round Rock
      
        42
        
          
        
      
      
        Austin urban congestion0.41
        Active I-35 construction0.27
        Moderate weather risk0.12
      
      ⚠  Monitor Conditions
    

    
      
        Route C
        POOR
      
      San Antonio → US-183 East via Gonzales → Round Rock
      
        21
        
          
        
      
      
        Rural road conditions0.44
        Crosswind advisory0.33
        Limited rest stops0.21
      
      ✕  Delay Recommended
    

  




  COVERAGE
  Built for the Roads That Matter
  From major interstates to rural corridors, Llano covers the routes your fleet depends on.
  




  SAFETY AUDIT
  Built for the Boardroom and the Broker
  Auto-generated safety reports your fleet can hand directly to insurers.
  

    
      
        
        
        
        acme-logistics-safety-audit-q1-2026.pdf
      
      

        
          Llano
          
            Fleet Safety Audit Report
            Q1 2026 · January 1 – March 31
          
        

        
          Acme Logistics Inc.
          Report generated April 2, 2026
        

        
          
            71/100
          
          
            Good
            ↑ +4 pts vs Q4 2025
          
          Overall Safety Score
        

        
          
            4,821
            Routes Scored
          
          
            87%
            Compliance Rate
          
          
            2.1M
            Miles Covered
          
        

        Factor Breakdown
        
          
            Weather Exposure
            
            74
          
          
            Road Quality
            
            81
          
          
            Traffic
            
            58
          
          
            Incident History
            
            79
          
        

        
          
            
            Certified by Llano · Third-party scored · Not self-reported
          
          p. 1 of 8
        

      
    

    
      
        📋
        
          Insurer-Ready Format
          Third-party certified scores and methodology summaries designed to satisfy underwriter requirements — not self-reported safety claims.
        
      
      
        📈
        
          Trend Over Time
          Quarterly safety score history and period-over-period improvement give insurers the longitudinal data they need to price risk accurately.
        
      
      
        ✅
        
          Compliance Tracking
          Track how often dispatchers act on Llano recommendations. Demonstrated safety culture is more credible than any self-reported metric.
        
      
      
        📍
        
          Hotspot Attribution
          Recurring risk concentrations mapped across your full route network — with incident correlation that builds actuarial credibility over time.
        
      
    

  






  CLI
  Score Routes from the Command Line
  A native CLI for fleet safety managers. No API integration required — just install, configure once, and go.

  

    
      
        
        |:| llano
      
      
      
        $ llano setup
        Welcome to Llano. Let's get you configured.
         
        API key: ••••••••••••
        Router [valhalla]: tomtom
        TomTom API key: ••••••••••••
        Config saved to ~/.llano/config.yml ✓
         
        $ llano score \
        --from "Laredo, TX" \
        --to "Dallas, TX" \
        --depart "2026-03-15 08:00" \
        --profile "18-wheeler"
         
          Fetching routes...  ✓
          Scoring segments... ✓
         
        
          
            
            Route
            Time
            Safety
            
          
          
            ★
            I-35 N
            2h 47m
            1 in 2,841 trips
            GOOD
          
          
            2
            US-83 via Cotulla
            3h 02m
            1 in 1,654 trips
            FAIR
          
        
         
          Generate report? (y/n): 
      
      
    

    
      
        
          🔌
          
            Works with your router
            Plug in your PC*Miler, TomTom, or HERE API key. No new routing software required.
          
        
        
          🚛
          
            Vehicle profiles
            Save height, weight, axle load, and hazmat settings per vehicle class. Reference by name on every run.
          
        
        
          📄
          
            PDF reports
            Route map, hotspots, and safety score in an insurer-ready PDF — generated with a single flag.
          
        
      

      
        
          Download Llano CLI
          v0.1.0-beta
        
        
          
            🍎
            macOSApple Silicon
          
          
            🍎
            macOSIntel
          
          
            🖥️
            Windowsx86-64
          
          
            🐧
            Linuxx86-64
          
        
        Early access — request a key to get started
      

    
  




  Ready to de-risk your routes?
  Llano is in early access. Join the waitlist and be first to integrate.
